title: Beccariella chartacea

The Sapotaceae family is part of the larger order Ericales, which includes a wide range of plant species. intro: Beccariella chartacea is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and preventing infections.
